'''Kalakar Six''' was a volcanic moon of [[Dromund Kalakar]] in the Outer Rim. It was covered in [[Magma/Legends|lava]] flows, its crust riddled with magma tunnels.

==History==
Kalakar Six was a moon with [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] nexus which was once occupied by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]. It was located in the same system as [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]], the location of the [[Dark Force]] temple of the [[Prophets of the Dark Side]].<ref name="A Silent City" />

During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]], an old [[Kalakar Six settlement|settlement]] had been discovered which was preserved by ash from an eruption.<ref name="A Silent City" />

Rumors held that around [[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]], the moon's dark side nature attracted [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Yorn (noble)|Yorn]] and his followers from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], who set up a fortress with the intent to conduct experiments there. However, a supply ship later noted that everyone there had vanished, except for Yorn, who had gone mad, tearing out his own [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and tongue.

[[File:Kalakar_Six_Search.jpg|thumb|left|250px|An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] team searches the surface of Kalakar Six.]]

Just prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] came to the moon in an attempt to intercept the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] carrying the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]]. The Rebels were not there: Vader had been lured to the moon with false information by the local [[darksider]]s, who [[Duel on Kalakar Six|pitted]] Vader against a doppelgänger of [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]. Vader killed the ersatz Maul. [[Darth Sidious]] soon arrived on the moon in a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], killing the darksiders and retrieving Vader. Vader suspected the entire ordeal had been a test arranged by the Emperor, but his master denied this.
